name: Girl And Demon 1
short_description: Prepare to unleash your inner dungeon master in Girl and Demon 1, the ultimate RPG for masochistic gamers. Delight in the dizzying array of complex status effects and mind-bogglingly high numbers that will make your head spin!
detailed_description:
Recommended For You



About the Game

About This Game

Immerse yourself in the quest of Seraphina, the princess of Artolia, who embarks on a perilous journey to retrieve the monstrous heart of the king, a coveted object sought after by her father. But as she delves deeper into her mission, she will unearth twisted occurrences that defy explanation, a darkness lurking in the shadows that threatens to consume her.

And yet, she must press on, gathering scarce treasures along the way and engaging in turn-based combat that appears deceptively simple but conceals an intricate web of strategies that demand cunning and quick thinking.

Are you ready to face the horrors that await?

Key Features

- Engaging, dramatic plot- Rich battle system
- Hundreds of skills & equipments for you to freely customize your characters
